name: Fact Checker
description: Real-time fact-checking with MBFC source credibility, MAGI multi-provider consensus, and flip-flop detection against cached speaker dossiers.
author: LinguaTaxi

provider.label: Provider: gemini (free), groq (free), claude (paid), or magi (all — weighted consensus)

claude_model.label: Claude model: sonnet (fast, 0.75 weight) or opus (best, 1.0 weight)

gemini_api_key.label: Google AI API Key (Gemini — free at aistudio.google.com, 0.70 weight)

groq_api_key.label: Groq API Key (free at groq.com, 0.30 weight)

brave_api_key.label: Brave Search API Key (required for Groq — free at brave.com/search/api)

flip_flop_enabled.label: Flip-Flop Detection: compare statements to speaker's past positions (true/false, requires upfront dossier prefetch)

mode.label: Mode: auto (check every statement) or manual (operator triggers checks)

local_filter.label: Local pre-filter: filters non-claims locally before API calls (true/false, requires model download)
